review_body_text: Everything is good. The workplace is nice and people are also willing to help. The workplace and work-culture appreciate people who are working overtime.
So much to learn here. Colleague is all nice but need to push for sales. All higher ups care is sales. Try banking if you love doing sales. Benefit is good. Have AL every month.
A good place to learn and improve in. The enviroment is chill, collegues are kind and are willing to assist if faced with issues. Overall is a good oppertunity for an internship placement.
Fast paced environment and can learn a lot of new things. Pleasent people to work with. Great benefits and perks. Moderate level of work and life balance.

Not to say that all departments are like this but majority of leaders who has been with the bank >10years will have mentality like this. My advise is to ask a lot of questions during your interview so you can judge whether it is a good fit for you. Other than that, good benefits and bonus 😬

My internship at Maybank was an incredibly valuable experience. I learned how a leading financial institution operates and gained hands-on exposure to real banking tasks. The team was supportive and always willing to guide me, which helped me develop both technical and communication skills. I was involved in data entry, customer service, and administrative work, which improved my attention to detail and time management. The working environment was professional yet friendly, making it easy to adapt and learn. Overall, my internship at Maybank gave me a strong foundation and clearer understanding of the banking industry.

A great place to learn and grow as an intern. The environment is supportive, with great leaders and amazing teammates who are always willing to help. There’s a good work-life balance, especially with the weekly work-from-home option. Things can get a bit hectic during system changes, but overall it’s a valuable and enjoyable learning experience.

review_title: very good experience because can learn about work environment
review_body_text: What is the best part of working at the company? friendly staff and good environment. What is the most stressful part about working at the company? stress if there is any accidental mistake that we didn't notice and need to re do whole thing.
Need to achieve a high kpi with changing directions from upper management. Fast pace environment. Not supportive manager. However good environment and supportive team members

review_title: Everything is great here, can learn so many things but do not become protege or join programme
review_body_text: Chances of you getting a job permanently is almost impossible. Please reconsider if you expecting to have stable career soon after graduation. In terms of learning and experience you might gain a lot but not appreciating protege or graduate lvl.
great co workers never stressful you can go home on time work life balance bosses are kind and they always check up on you they are also responsive of your inquiries

I would like to take this opportunity to express my heartfelt appreciation to my colleagues at Maybank Alor Setar who have been incredibly supportive and generous with their guidance since my very first day. Their willingness to share knowledge, their patience in teaching, and their constant encouragement have made a huge difference in my growth and confidence at work. They’re not just coworkers — they’ve become mentors who are always ready to help without hesitation. Every piece of advice and every small lesson has helped me improve and become more efficient in handling my responsibilities. I truly value the positive and professional work environment they create, filled with teamwork, respect, and mutual support. Thank you for being such wonderful teammates and for making my experience here so meaningful. I’m truly grateful, and I hope our bond continues to grow stronger as we move forward together.

My internship experience was okay overall. It really depends on which department you’re placed in—if you end up in the right one, it’s easier to fit in and there’s a better chance of getting absorbed into the company. The allowance was given based on the number of days you worked, which might not work for everyone expecting a fixed monthly pay. Honestly the people in my team are nice, but in terms of workloads there weren’t much that interns are allowed to do as it is customer’s privacy matters.
Pro Good benefits to employee-insurance,bonus,allowances,increment,epf, staff loan, building facilities Cons Promoted next grade slow Too many expatriates
Maybank is a good place for fresh graduate, a lot you can learn and develop here. However, there is no work life balance that may make you exhausted. Need to always on standby mode.
Good environment good workplace excellent customer care service able to deliver customer satisfaction with care. Career enhancing and good vibes. Really enjoyed

Great Work Environment: Employees often mention the inclusive and collaborative culture at Maybank. There is a strong sense of teamwork, and people enjoy working in a diverse, respectful, and supportive environment. Work-Life Balance: Many reviews highlight the company's efforts to maintain a good work-life balance. Employees appreciate the flexibility in working hours, the option for remote work (in some roles), and generous leave policies. Career Growth Opportunities: Maybank is known for offering career advancement opportunities. Employees often note that the company invests in their professional development, with various training programs and mentorship opportunities available to support career progression. Employee Benefits: Benefits packages are another strong point. Maybank offers competitive compensation, health insurance, retirement benefits, and wellness programs. Employees value these perks, which contribute to their overall job satisfaction. Leadership and Management: Many employees appreciate the approachable leadership at Maybank, noting that management is supportive and values open communication. The company fosters a culture of feedback, which helps employees feel heard and valued.
Maybank offers a fun and healthy work environment where employees were able to work and strive to be better everyday. The employees were very supportive.

review_title: Great place to kickstart your career
review_body_text: A typical day is fast-paced, full of learning opportunities. Great management, supportive culture. Hardest part: tight deadlines. Best part: teamwork!
A lot people that you can meet. Salary is quite ok but not too fancy. Bonus can be down to 2 months. But usually is 3 months. Management will be depends on your manager
the working enviroment depends on the department. Good paying company and work life balance. the work is stress and if u can handle then you can work here
The best experience ever. Learnt a lot of new stuff and get a lot of help from higher ups regarding the work scope. Easy to apply. Able to learn about market

review_body_text: Good environment and helpful colleagues. Gain a lot of benefits. Sometimes hard to dealing with customers. Overall it was a nice company to working with.
Overall it's a good workplace and there are many roles in the Bank where you can apply for swaps. Good pay and bonus, yet there's no work life balance.
Can be limited progression, especially in a competitive environment. The quiet ones but really great working attitude tends to be left out n teased upon.

review_title: Decent Place to Start Your Internship
review_body_text: Overall internship experience was good. There were a lot of event being held at Menara Maybank for the seasonal events, such as Chinese New Year and Christmas.

1. Good benefits 2. Good career progression opportunities 3. Freedom to be creative and develop solutions as long as it’s aligned with the bank’s values 4. Great environment 5. A lot of opportunities to learn and develop skills

nice colleague, best working environment, got training and seniors are willingly to teach you if you are lost or dumbfounded. hope to get a permanent job at maybank
sales target is too high and management will push you to hit every month. management is not helping, but colleague all okay and supportive. benefits are great
Managers are quite supportive despite i was in sales line. Customer base are quite wide and can be tricky to handle but the customer are very warm to hear any proposal from maybank
Good working in maybank. Have a good benefit, continuous learning, great teamwork with the team. But working in sales department , you must achieved target to get commission

Great team, supportive culture, challenging work. Fosters learning & growth, highly recommend! Positive environment, flexible hours, great benefits. High pressure, long hours, limited growth opportunities. Unclear expectations, poor communication, low morale.

review_title: Not a productive environment to work with

What is the best part of working at the company? Salary and the benefits. Experience What is the most stressful part about working at the company? On the Friday..good mood always

review_title: Workload didn’t worth the salary. Old working system.

Internal process are still in traditional methodology but ironically they require you to work in a fast pace manner. If you were to come from an MNC company to here, you would experience culture shock on how outdated/old-school it feels in Maybank Head Office.
Maybank Investment Bank offers excellent learning, supportive seniors, and ample growth opportunities—an enriching environment to thrive in. Would recommend for graduates
Joined as a student ambassador and got to involve into the GenM Summit. Fun activity though. Maybank academy was quie a nice place and surprised they had buffet there.

Maybank provides a supportive team environment and strong professional growth opportunities. Work-life balance can be challenging, but competitive benefits and a focus on employee well-being compensate.

Title: Maybank - A Superb Workplace My experience at Maybank has been truly outstanding, and here's why it stands out as an exceptional workplace: 1. **Inclusive Culture**: Maybank fosters diversity and inclusion, creating a strong sense of belonging among employees. 2. **Supportive Management**: Maybank's leadership is approachable and values employee feedback. 3. **Work-Life Balance**: The company promotes work-life balance, offering flexibility and wellness support. 4. **Growth Opportunities**: Maybank invests in professional development and career advancement. 5. **Competitive Benefits**: They offer competitive compensation and a comprehensive benefits package. 6. **Innovation**: Maybank embraces innovation and technology, keeping the work dynamic. 7. **Community Engagement**: Maybank encourages community involvement, giving employees a sense of purpose. 8. **Collaborative Environment**: Teamwork is a priority, creating a positive and productive atmosphere. 9. **Modern Facilities**: The workplace is comfortable, modern, and well-equipped. 10. **Job Security**: Maybank provides stability and financial security. In summary, Maybank is a community of passionate individuals working together to achieve common goals. If you seek a workplace that values employees, promotes growth, and makes a positive impact, Maybank is the place to be.

review_title: Good place to start a career

review_title: Not easy but you can make it
review_body_text: As you know, sales is never easy. However, rezq js everywhere. The early process would be stressful as majority of the seniors wouldn't be a much of help once you start your target. Kind of independent. Relax and pick up your pace. If your branch environment did not help you, please ask to transfer. Your first step is very important. Speaking from my little experience, I do have the product knowledge but that alone is not enough. Support from surrounding is needed too BUT YOU MUST SHOW THE EFFORT. Else, they won't help you. Make sense? Good luck
Great workplace. Meet a lot of people there. The team I work with were great. Benefits are great. Fast pace working environment. Help me to develop a great skill set.
Very good and so much intertaining with mainly good condition and so much fun every day of the life work balance with the supportance of people and manager
Fun place to work, always new thing to learn. Gòod staff benefityes, annual leave, medical benefityes, bonus, good place go gain good experience on the banking line.

And to get well paid yearly increment and bonus, you must do the norm which is exceeding your daily job and your boss expectation. If you got into Group Tech, you can get the most top technology experiences. But in order to gain this precious experiences and new skills, you must not expect work life balance.

review_title: Very challenging and fast working environment
review_body_text: As Sales Consumer Executive, we have to process mortgage, ASB financing, credit card and will writing. It seems easy at first, but sales as we all know, skills is very important. Product knowledge must always in head and avoid making miscomunicated or wrongly advise to the customer. Process must be fast and most cases must be done in 1 day. This is fast pace working environment, you must process is fast since all the customer need loan as soon as possible. Very challenging and also fun if you can do it. Very recommend to a person who have skills in selling.

review_title: Very well structured work approach & comprehensive balance score card

review_title: Recommend to those who want a fast-paced career

Nice environment, lot of benefit and facilities, spoon with 1 month training with sufficient enough and confident to start work, best senior staff, bosses. Always assist/advised when needed, rewards to best staff every month, birthday wishes/gift, celebrate all major festive, respect each others.

review_title: It is a stressful job but its worth it.

review_title: Company is taking care on employee benefit

review_title: Best place to work,lovely colleagues,best environment

Good salary to start with. Working hours is flexible for sale person. The hardest part of the job is target and kpi. Workplace culture is very good and friendly.
i learned how to face a customer must be good at dressup to impress customer management is good,leader is friendly so many training given to improve us

I also gain experience in marketing Maybank products through phone calling and face to face explanation.

A lot of benefit working with Maybank.Medical for staff and family. Working wih MAYBANK also can learned all the culture of banking. THANK YOU maybank give me a chance and experience in your companyand enjoyable part of the job.
Its a beat place to start your career and for career advancement Lot of opportunity inside the bank Opportunity to learn more and settle your life as well
Great to have experience working with Maybank. Knowledgeable and good benefit. Humanising employer to staff and family member. Very closed to community with cahaya kasih and charity day.

review_title: enjoying & no need to worries about pending task

Work as bankers can live in a safe place. Besides that, can develop and sharpen our skills in this bank. We learn many thinga here and also multitasking.

review_title: able to learn more and be productive on banking fields

Opportunities to excel for your career advancement apparent. A very high learning culture and sales oriented environment. Attractive reward and employee benefits.

Opportunities are less given to juniors and senior does not want to help or guide junior in their task as they say they are to busy. Have to learn by own. No guidance when no guidance how to learn. Overall working colleagues are friendly.

I work at hq. So far the facilities are good. They provide gym, library, prayer room, food court etc. About work, the working hours also ok. Start working at 8.45 And end at 5.45. Need to make a call to customer and liaise with them about their card debit/ credit. Help them to activate the new card. I learned so many things here, with helpful colleagues I can learn and enhance my microsoft office skills.

Job Work/Life Balance- very good Compensation/Benefits - very good Job Security/Advancement - very good Management - good, they have very systematic management Job Culture - very good. happy working place

cons_text: Life seems to cater within work than personal life

review_body_text: Stable company background, good brand on local & oversea. Having completed structure & clear visions. Easy to fullfill customer's needs with much branches on Malaysia.

Typical day at work are interesting. Could meet many people that we can learnt. Their management could be a guidances to other banks. Hardest part of job that i can share is when you cannot understand their work and you must hardworking to find and know or ask the other employee.

review_title: The most enjoyable part of the job
review_body_text: I have learned new thing through out this journey experience and it is also build my self confidence level to the maximum level. The environment of job working space also makes me feel excited to work there also get surrounding with positive employee.
Learn new things. Different challenges everyday. Enhance communication skill. Seniority. Explore new things. Need patience. Need to work hard since expectation too high.
Good career development for fresh graduate to gain their knowledge in banking sector. Interactive workplace with lots of activities such birthday celebration, portluck, futsal & badminton

review_body_text: The challenging and excellent working environment that makes me easier to gain more experiences and enhances skill from a senior executive and manager

review_title: Have a dinner good boss and great staff

A very pressuring job. This is my first job after graduating. I haven't got any banking or insurance experience before, so it is really a challenge for me. Everyday i will be pressure by my boss that can lead me to feel very down & not confident at all.

I was only doing an internship but it was interesting as the manager and supervisor were helpful and guide throughout the process of assimilating in the workforce. I was able to work autonomously and able to meet client. Understanding how everything works.

review_title: Good experience with a good team work foundation
review_body_text: Working with this bank has develop me to become more organise and self sufficient. It has also made me to prioritize the importance of the task given and to multi task. With the well management and support from the company , it has enable me to work whiles making sure I have time for my family. With a well diverse country, I work alongside with many diversified colleagues and learned about the many cultures we have. The hardest part of my job would be at times due to the multi culture , I would have to put in extra hours during the festive time and working for a Country Head of the Bank , can be demanding at times. The best and most enjoyable part of the job is that I get to experience good food, great friends and fantastic opportunity to travel !
pros_text: Over time pay, Yearly Bonus, Humanity Rights, Medical, Insurance
cons_text: Long hours, Overload work, Lack of manpower

review_body_text: Challenging duty. Interest rate keep on changing without memo. Selected sales person are given the leads of a potential customet whilst the others are given the recycled leads.

Truly a collaborative environment. Great perks, lots of on-site facilities, ie: workout room, meditation room, etc... Catered food and a very well-stocked kitchen. Up to date IT and infrastructure, great training and ramp up. Excellent managers to work with. A positive and inclusive culture.
Got to learn new technologies and learned to interact with clients.Made new friends from different diversities. Learned to be punctual as the bank needed me to be on time for work.
Can work in team, and get to exchange idea and advice from superior. Helping each other no only focusing in the same department but other department also.

Excellent benefits for staff. We were equipped with knowledge and skills. Everything was very tactical and practical with Maybank. Staff’s benefits are one of the great thing in Maybank. There are a lots of benefits and good quality with Maybank.

I love working here as i have served Maybank for the past 6 years and also my first company that i joined straight after my graduation. My post now need me to sit down with my superior at least 2 hours, meeting and brainstorming on how to boost our company profit. My job scope now is Business Development Officer for Foreign Currency Notes. My job area is to review tenancy agreement for Forex Booth and help in generating income for Forex Booth and branches. My scope includes generating new business proposal, writing new business requirement, set up event and business generating new projection proposal.
cons_text: limited medical coverage for spouse and limited coverage for dental

review_body_text: Its a typical GLC company that comprises multi layer management level. Great place to learn and with its structured environment, one with agility may face obstacles.
Being an intern there was special, guidance given, tasks clearly communicated, support provided, mistakes are pointed out professionally, constant learning and development

Role as CEO to direct, lead and monitor whole company operation towards getting better performance in terms of sales and profitability. The best school to learn about the process of a big company. All experience with Maybank are useful with new chapter in my working life.
Opportunities in meeting great people and great teams but culture aren't pleasant. Shows no mercy and look down on Junior staff. No teamwork promoted.

- Learning about financial services for example loan, insurance, saving account, etc. - The learning outlines are targeted for the roles in frontline as well as customer facing. - Can work as a part of team and exchange idea among manager and employee.

Enjoyed experience of work place working with motivated colleagues. Management and colleagues are so supportive. The hardest part of the job was having to struggle to achieve monthly target with the recycle leads produced by management. There is no work life balance if didn't not achieve target on that month. You will be lectured to hit sales from different embarrassed ways.
one of the top bank in south asia. big company that u should fight to work with them. Job opportunities less as they start doing digital banking. Learn a lot from this company

Have been working for more than 15 years, was a great experience in various section from processing loan application, marketing, reviewing and monitoring loan portfolio, system administration, customer service for internal and external, including managing business report.

as u know maybank give their employee very good benefits but their senior staff are so cocky.rotation shift are boring with less of support.no bonding like u are working alone.mostly workers can stand 2-3months

review_title: It is an okay place to work at

What i have learn from there is : - take seriously on our task and try completing the task before deadline -help each other’s - pantual on attendance - Working culture fun - last thing the most im enjoyable at there is management alwyas have a plan for our department go outing
Excellent company for career growth. Can learn how to managed fraud case and create a wonderful customer experiance and makes them feels great when do any inquiry with Maybank

The practice of TIGER values within the bank creates all employees to be committed and have ownership in achieving their milestones

For example, dealing with different kind of customer's attitudes, promoting and selling the company's products as well as doing some documentation in the working place. The most enjoying part of the job is able to create a very strong bond between the employees in the office. However, the hardest part of the job is to maintain the target consistently for the company on the daily basis, which means we need to achieve our target at the end of each day.

review_title: Staff management depends on overall top management.l

pros_text: Activity after ofice hour.(internal activity sports darts, )

review_body_text: Great place to work, alot of opportunities to learn, empowerment, work life balance. If you are willing to go extra mile, the organisation would do the same in return.

cons_text: Not a good place to learn

review_body_text: having a very good experience work place with motivated colleagues. They all are very discipline, trained and hard working. Management given a lot of opportunity and training to improved skills both off paper and on paper. This position served positive learning experience,
The bank provide good career opportunity and training platform. Good benefits for those who willing to work hard. I wish to recommend graduate to grab the opportunity to work with Maybank
frendly working culture grow working experience high benefit and meet expected salary increase practical training and high supervision able to work in various department

review_body_text: Good working environment, working 5 days monday to friday, a lot of benefits such as medical coverage, staff loan, salary increment every year, bonus and etc

review_title: Plenty of opportunity for Career Growth

review_title: Overall the working environment is good.

cons_text: calling people on daily basis, sometimes the same person call over and over gain

review_body_text: Fun workplace with fun colleagues. The staffs and the boss are very friendly. There are many benefits working at Maybank especially the leave and the bonus.

Promote financial products to bank customers and must always achieve target given.Must be able yo answer all customers queries and always be prepared to assist any difficulties.

review_body_text: My ideal working environment is one where there's a good sense of team spirit. A strong work ethic is obviously important but the human side is also important. I enjoy working with people who have a decent sense of humour and who, while they might take their work very seriously, don't necessarily take themselves overly seriously! I like people who are down to earth but who have a dynamic and progressive approach to their work. I really enjoy working as part of a highly committed and professional team

The hardest part was when I had to attend anger and fussy customer but that built up my skills and confidence level in customer service. The most enjoyable part of the job was when I got rewarded for my worked by the management.

review_title: The best medical benefit among banks

pros_text: great medical benefit, fixed yearly salary increment
cons_text: long working hours. need to work on weekend and holidays.

review_body_text: Working environment is great, coworkers are helpful and friendly "Friendly culture, helpful seniors, good place to learn" "Long Working Hours and tight deadlines" "Lower-than-average work life balance and lack of transparency for goals and needs"

review_title: Opportunity to engage with different levels of people

review_title: I enjoy and have fun in working place

Guide customer to apply loan Always share market info with colleagues Customer will appreciate my hard work when getting their home loan A healthy working environment

Super employer. Very accommodating to its employees. So many benefits. Flexible. A lot of perks. Can participate in many volunteer works (ie. as part of corporate social responsiblity)

review_title: Productivity and energetic team and workplace
review_body_text: - passionate and energetic team with the leader - learned how to communicate well with customer as well as with colleagues - hardest part at first to accept rejection from client , but after certain period of experience, learned to adapt and response it

review_title: i can learn more about management,humanising and well known

You will have to take the initiative and be proactive to learn and grow. You must show that hunger, a desire for success, and be committed to achieving your goals, in tandem with achieving Maybank’s.
One of the popular fast food restaurants in the world..free lunch..happy to serving the people eating the foods..halal's job....teamwork..simple job..

review_title: Top bank in Malaysia with good work life balance
review_body_text: Within 4 years working in Maybank i realized that Maybank have a very good organizational culture. TIGER aspiration in Maybank are Teamwork,Integrity,Growth,Excellence and Efficiency and Relationship Building To be the top bank in Malaysia,Maybank is very committed in investing in the human spirit.
It was fun workplace with great colleagues, but the job is quite stress and challenging. However, the company gave good compensation and benefits to its employees.
Jobs are well brief and everything for and easy daily use like surau, kitchen are available in the building, office worker are friendly jobs culture are very satisfied

review_title: Fun work place & the friendly management
review_body_text: I learned many things from the small to the complex one. Love the workplace culture very much besides the managements are very friendly. It teach you for not to make mistake first that will burden others one day. Overall, I really miss my last job because i have many friends who are so helping & bosses like my own family.

review_title: Fun evironment working place and team work
review_body_text: I had learned how to work on a team... I have to work on office hours..... The management in maybank is awesome... The only hardest part is I had to end the contract..

there are many ad-hock task. need to process document from customer urgently. receiving more than 100 documents from customer every day. the management of the company is good. the hardest is need to complete the document urgently. most enjoyable experience is can learn many things at that department.

i am very glad to be a part of Maybank Islamic Berhad as a whole. I learnt more that I thought I would here. being attached under Policy Analytics, have teach me product cycle in end to end basis and on the shariah based contract.
Assist customer via calls regarding their banking issues. Provide information regarding online bankings and raise report for issues on banking.

review_title: Place where you can learn a lot of thing
review_body_text: Place where you can develop yourself more confident by attend different kind of people. Giving you an experience how to manage customer in a better way.

review_title: Efficiently work and have fun event

review_title: Productive -Maybank is one of the leading bank in Malaysia

Personality -Able to work under pressure -Able to work well with people at all level -Willing to accept new ideas and changes. The reason for changes is like to stay and work in Singapore.

review_title: More pro active and enjoyed meeting with people

Different branch different kind of environment with different types of leader. Ive been in a productive branch but in a rural area. A productive activities is only on the operation sides while on a sales activities we have to struggle more in order to achieve our monthly target.
Learned how to manage customers. It is tough but very challeging. The enviroment is superb. Good managements. Sporting managers. Friendly peoples.

Good benefit Learn many from.other dept Compliance issue hardest part Service many people at different level More alert internal and external fraud
- One of the best compensation in the industry - Big ambition for Asia - Quite process heavy - Good and competent people - Not for the weak-spirited -

The best experience while working in maybank when our KPI performance is either on target or exceed target. Meaning we delivered our tasks in timely manner or performance rating could be better than higher management expectation. The reason why bonus will be paid based on rating percentage and key performance in our KPI. Our employer never failed to pay bonus to entire staff except for those who didn't perform well. In additional, we also will be getting an ESOS, equity shareholders. Meaning all Maybankers beneficial will be entitled an ESOS offer depends on their level or position. The higher position is the better ESOS offered. Medical benefits is the most important and the most valuable HR benefit for Maybankers. It will covers a staff and also a family members where it won't be as same as with any other sectors of financial institution or company locally.
pros_text: Good to work in permanently because of HR benefits
cons_text: Management didn't bother their staffs who suffering with internal political issues

review_title: Very good company with all the benefits but when you're looking for career advancement, its hard to go further

The most enjoyable part is we can travel anywhere to meet up with the clinet.

For me, the best employer in malaysia is maybank. I felt regret leaving mahbank in year 2015 where I insist to take a challlenge become a manager in rhb. But in maybank... the promotion is limited for each branch every year . So if you want something fastrack for career, you definately wont easily get . As many of senior staff waiting for long.

review_title: A boring place to work but alot of benefits

review_title: environment and culture in working place
review_body_text: The environment and culture in the company has help me to learn many new thing. It also help me to improve my skill and production in order to serve the organization.

Working for 3 years and 7 months as a banker really provide me with a lot of experience. Started my career as BMELP which is a talent management program that I have had passing through for 2 years enable me to adopt a fast learning culture and contributes towards a productive working culture as I was all-rounder for a branch management. After BMELP, I then joined in a more specific sector which is Small and Medium Enterprise (SME) as Business Development Executive (BDE). This role is important because as BDE, I am tasked to meet with customer and offering them financial assistance. This relatively contributes towards the positive growth in Maybank.

review_title: Productive and a good place to work
review_body_text: Working at Maybank was a memorable experience . Every day there are new things that await . With a team that always come together , every challenge can be overcome easily . Good guidance from management that constantly encourage the spirit of cooperation as a team makes every challenge becomes easy to overcome.

The workers were very friendly and helpful throughout my internship process. My supervisor pushed me to the very limit to do the given tasks and it was a very wonderful experience as it had given me a solid introduction working in a fast-paced business banking sector.
Very cooperative staff and great teamwork. Good culture create by manager to all staff. I have been working with friendly staff here.
duty as customer care officer managing daily operational work; staff & do sales convincing clients to sign up sales is tough feel good if clients are happy

review_title: Very good and productive job culture
review_body_text: Every day was a challenging and exciting day at work since i'm in the sales position in the organisation. My previous position taught me about customer service, helping me enhancing my personal skills and everything about financial service. The co-workers were helpful. The hardest part of the job is when i need to convincing people to buy the banks product but although it is hard, i took it up as a challenge and it excites me everytime i managed to convince customers to buy the products. The most enjoyable part of the job is when i do felt i am helping these customers to reach their desirable financial goals through ways such as long-term investments and it is enjoyable when i get to assist the banks customers in every way that i can.

Maybank teach me a lot in managing my tasks, my time. The management is good in appreciating staff. My boss show me a good leadership in work. The hardest part of my previous job was handling money (as a Teller) while the enjoyable part of my previous job was being able to learn so many things regarding banking, office works, teamwork, integrity and relationship building.

do data entry and customer service have learned more about banking world management so far not so good but overall is ok non permanent staff more supportive than permanent staff here the hardest part when in UAT TEAM - have to go back late the most enjoyable part of the job is i'm doing what i love to do and have chance to do new things ; build engagement with customers,call customer for classroom training

review_title: Productive workplace aiming for the same goal

All colleagues were very helpful and never hesitated to lend a hand in any kind of circumstances. Everyone in our department were aiming for the same goal, which is to earn desirable incentives. The salary offered was at satisfactory level.

The environment is very encouraging in terms of support and learning Looking forward to see a an improvised FRS 139 in year 2018.

review_title: The best experiences working as customer service
review_body_text: I really enjoyed in servicing industry because I feel satisfaction when customer’s giving good feedback, compliment and feeling happy when their enquiries or problem resolve. I love customer support because I love the constant human interaction because it is our nature and it will improve my communication skill and English language. As we know, customer service relates to the service provided to customers before, during and after a purchase. Customer service is a front desk or first contact for customers to voice their inquiries, feedback and suggestions. We becomes such important to customers as well as company images. I feel such a lot of appreciation when performing job.

review_title: Great place to work with people-oriented culture

review_title: Fun but the office culture is not healthy
review_body_text: Working with Maybank Berhad in credit card department was a such great experience to gained. It taught me on how to be more patient especially confronting customers via telephone. It also improve my communication skills, interpersonal skills, and computer skills. I also got the chance on how to read customers' credit card statements. However, instead of good things that I got during working with Maybank Credit Card, there were also bad things happened in the office, which is the office culture. The credit card department operating via telephone so, there were times where the senior employee pass the telephone to the junior employee because they do not want to entertain the customers and solve their problems. I hope the problems of bad office culture can be solved in the future and the higher authority of the company could play their roles.
pros_text: Can improve the communication skill and solving problem. Besides, the job taught me to be more patient in confronting the customers.
cons_text: The salary is not worth with the job. Should increase the salary.
